subject: WM-0160 review: changes_requested
body: Blocker: lifecycle/message listener cleanup is not reliable for concurrent public wait/drain helpers. packages/sim-worker/src/browser-session.ts emits lifecycle/message listeners by iterating the live listener array, while packages/sim-worker/src/playable-drain.ts cleanup unsubscribes by splicing that same array during emit. With two pending wait/drain calls, session.destroy() rejects the first but skips the second, leaving a pending promise that can outlive the session. Fix by snapshotting listeners before emit or otherwise making unsubscribe-during-emit safe, and add focused coverage for multiple concurrent wait/drain helpers on destroy/shutdown and/or shared UiDelta delivery.
